caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, glasses, and large black headphones speaks into a black microphone in an indoor setting. He is wearing a tall, conical, silver-gray wig that stands upright. The background is a wall adorned with several framed photographs and various clothing items, including a yellow shirt with the text "LEE" visible. To the right of the man, a white garment bag hangs. A logo and text are superimposed on the scene, reading "OSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly while maintaining his gaze toward someone off-camera. The microphone remains stationary in the foreground, and the overall environment remains constant as the man continues his conversation.
